_comment: Committed null schema for the obligation register (P23 Phase 3). Real dated obligations live in pipeline/user-context/obligation-register.local.json (gitignored; stays on the creator's machine). This file defines the shape only. The dates are computed offline by tools/obligations.py (send-by, weekend/US-holiday roll-back, urgency bands); the obligation-extract atom supplies the rows. This is organization only, never legal advice.
_boundary: RESEARCH NOTES. NOT LEGAL ADVICE. REVIEW WITH A LICENSED ATTORNEY IN YOUR JURISDICTION BEFORE ACTING.

obligations.urgency_band: red | orange | yellow | out_of_band | overdue | unknown
